zh.lifeSummary: 當Egidia Graham於1536年出生在蘇格蘭金加迪爾時，她的父親Robert Graham29歲，母親Egidia Giles Douglas31歲。她於1552年2月14日與William Douglas 9th Earl of Angus在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾亨特利結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1606年7月4日在英國蘇格蘭培爾布拉可福德享年70歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭金加迪爾格倫維。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Egidia Graham于1536年出生在苏格兰金加迪爾时，她的父亲Robert Graham29岁，母亲Egidia Giles Douglas31岁。她于1552年2月14日与William Douglas 9th Earl of Angus在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾亨特利结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1606年7月4日在英国苏格兰培爾布拉可福德享年70岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰金加迪爾格倫維。

nameMeanings.name: Graham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Grantham in Lincolnshire, recorded in Domesday Book as Graham (as well as Grantham, Grandham, and Granham). See also Grantham .

Irish (especially Ulster): in Ireland Graham is generally the Scottish name, but it has additionally been adopted as an Anglicized form of both Ó Creacháin (see Crehan ) and Ó Gormghaile (see Gormley ).

History: The surname Graham was taken to Scotland at the beginning of the 12th century by the Norman baron William de Graham, holder of the manor of Grantham in Lincolnshire, from whom many if not all modern bearers are probably descended. The chief of Clan Graham is the Duke of Montrose.

variants.name: Greim
meanings: South German: from a short form of a compound personal name beginning with the element grīm ‘mask, helmet’.

variants.name: Grahm
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire and northern England): shortened form of   Graham  .

variants.name: Grantham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire and East Yorkshire): habitational name from Grantham in Lincolnshire, of uncertain origin. The final element is Old English hām ‘homestead’; the first may be Old English grand ‘gravel’ or perhaps a personal name Granta, which probably originated as a byname meaning ‘snarler’. See also Graham .

variants.name: Grahame
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Graham  . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is as high as 261, while the figure for 2010 is supposedly lower than 100.

nameMeanings.name: Egidia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Egidia Graham was born in 1536, in Kincardineshire, Scotland, her father, Robert Graham, was 29 and her mother, Egidia Giles Douglas, was 31. She married William Douglas 9th Earl of Angus on 14 February 1552, in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 4 July 1606, in Blackford, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 70, and was buried in Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Egidia Graham est née en 1536, à Kincardineshire, Écosse, son père, Robert Graham, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Egidia Giles Douglas, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé William Douglas 9th Earl of Angus le 14 février 1552, à Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 juillet 1606, à Blackford, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Egidia Graham 1536 in Kincardineshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Graham 29 und ihre Mutter Egidia Giles Douglas 31. Sie hat am 14. Februar 1552 in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom William Douglas 9th Earl of Angus geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. Juli 1606 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Blackford, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Egidia Graham è nata il nel 1536 nel Kincardineshire, Scotland, sua padre, Robert Graham, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Egidia Giles Douglas, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato William Douglas 9th Earl of Angus il 14 febbraio 1552, nel Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 4 luglio 1606, nel Blackford, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Egidia Grahamが1536年にスコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert Grahamは29歳，母Egidia Giles Douglasは31歳であった。1552年2月14日にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアハントリーでWilliam Douglas 9th Earl of Angusと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1606年7月4日にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアブラクフォードで70歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアグレンバーヴィにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Egidia Graham(이)가 1536년 스컷랜드 킨카딘실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Graham(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Egidia Giles Douglas(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1552년 2월 14일 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 헌틀리에서 William Douglas 9th Earl of Angus(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1606년 7월 4일 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 블랙퍼드에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 킨카딘실르 글렌버비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Egidia Graham nasceu em 1536, em Kincardineshire, Scotland, seu pai, Robert Graham, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Egidia Giles Douglas, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com William Douglas 9th Earl of Angus em 14 de fevereiro de 1552, em Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de julho de 1606, em Blackford, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Egidia Graham родилась в 1536 г. в местности кинкардаинешир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Robert Graham было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Egidia Giles Douglas, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Douglas 9th Earl of Angus 14 февраля 1552 г. в местности хантли, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 4 июля 1606 г. в местности блэккфорд, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности гленбирви, кинкардаинешир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Egidia Graham nació en 1536, en Kincardineshire, Scotland, su papá, Robert Graham, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Egidia Giles Douglas, tenía 31 años. Se casó con William Douglas 9th Earl of Angus el 14 de febrero de 1552, en Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 4 de julio de 1606, en Blackford, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
